message.content:
Test file: src/claim-office.spec.ts
Activate test: "should apply 20% loyalty discount when customer has >= 2 years with MHPCO"
Current state: 16 tests passing
Implementation file: src/claim-office.ts

The loyalty discount is policy-wide (applied to the policy base premium = sum of all item base premiums). A 2-year customer with a plain sword: 100 base + 10 first-insurance - 20 loyalty + 5 fee = 95 G.

Customer: {yearsWithMHPCO: 2}. Items: [{type:"sword", material:"steel", enchantment:0, cursed:false}]. Expected: 95.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Green after completion.
You MUST output the full Step 7 block verbatim (both Compilation Prediction and Runtime Prediction lines, each with Correct or Incorrect). Do not abbreviate. Do not collapse the two prediction lines into one.
